text: What if I told you there's a jellyfish that can turn back time? Meet Turritopsis dohrnii, the immortal jellyfish. When faced with danger, it can revert to its juvenile form. This process, called transdifferentiation, allows it to escape death and start anew. Scientific studies reveal that this jellyfish can reset its life cycle, a rare ability in the animal kingdom. But don’t be fooled! Turritopsis dohrnii isn’t invincible. Predators and disease can still spell its end. Imagine a world where aging could be reversed... What if? Curious about more bizarre science? Like and follow for more!
